en: Hey son, well I hear you whispering the words melt everyone, but you stay so cool.
My Molokita, my Spanish Harlem Mona Lisa, you're my reason for reason, the step in my groove.
And if you said this life ain't good enough, I'd give my world to lift you up.
ko: 만약 네가 이 삶이 충분하지 않다고 말한다면

en: I could change my life to better suit your mood, because you're so smooth.
ko: 너의 기분에 맞게 내 삶을 바꿀 수 있어

en: And it's just like the ocean under the moon, it's the same as the emotion that I get from you.
You got the kind of lovin' that can be so smooth, yeah, give me your heart and make it real or else forget about it.
